title: l0rryQ's tweaks
description: tweaks for redstone, pvp, cpvp, etc
body:
# l0rryQ's tweaks

**include:**

- Sticky Piston Sides
- Age 25 Kelp
- Different Stems
- Directional Dispensers & Droppers
- Directional Observers
- Redstone Power Levels
- Groovy Levers
- Visible Tripwires
- Compass Lodestone
- Visual Honey Stages
- Brewing Guide
- Visual Note Block Pitch
- Directional Hoppers
- Unique Axolotl Buckets
- Visual Infested Stone (Items)
- Visual Waxed Copper (Items)
- Music Disc Redstone Level Preview
- Visual Cauldron Stages
- Visual Composter Stages
- Spinning Skull on Fire Painting
- Sus Sand and Gravel
- Quieter Dispensers and Droppers
- Quieter Pistons
- Quieter Nether Portals
- Quieter Explosions
- Proper Break Particles
- Desaturated Resin
- Bedrock Boom
- Dungeons Alex & Steve
- Paletteless Dyes
- Clearer Wither Hearts
- Colored Ping Indicator
- 3D Rails
- 3D Ladders
- 3D Iron & Copper Bars
- Unobtrusive Scaffolding
- Lower Fire
- Translucent Pumpkin Overlay
- mini items
- no explosion particles
- clear water
- and more...

*Credits:*
- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57149a7a1381e4b0708775e659b90a5d89907286_0.webp)
- [remove-slot-highlighting](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/remove-slot-highlighting)
